## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Carmel Schetrit (incoming CMO at Seed) and Marcel Santilli (founder of GrowthX) to discuss potential collaboration on content creation and SEO optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/K71gBjbTf1zEdAMyAJnDDfsQXzBzubzj?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Carmel is joining Seed, a French startup in the IT internal tools space, as CMO starting December 1st](https://fathom.video/share/K71gBjbTf1zEdAMyAJnDDfsQXzBzubzj?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [Marcel's company, GrowthX, offers AI-powered content creation and SEO optimization services](https://fathom.video/share/K71gBjbTf1zEdAMyAJnDDfsQXzBzubzj?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [GrowthX's workflow includes competitive research, keyword identification, and AI-assisted content generation](https://fathom.video/share/K71gBjbTf1zEdAMyAJnDDfsQXzBzubzj?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Potential collaboration areas: blog articles, site pages, FAQ docs, and solutions pages for Seed](https://fathom.video/share/K71gBjbTf1zEdAMyAJnDDfsQXzBzubzj?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

## Topics

### Professional Backgrounds

  - [Carmel: Joining Seed as CMO, previously at Redis, GitHub, and Vercel](https://fathom.video/share/K71gBjbTf1zEdAMyAJnDDfsQXzBzubzj?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [Marcel: Founded GrowthX, offering AI-powered content creation services](https://fathom.video/share/K71gBjbTf1zEdAMyAJnDDfsQXzBzubzj?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [GrowthX has 7 full-time employees and recently crossed $1M in ARR](https://fathom.video/share/K71gBjbTf1zEdAMyAJnDDfsQXzBzubzj?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)

### GrowthX Services

  - [AI workflows for content creation and SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/K71gBjbTf1zEdAMyAJnDDfsQXzBzubzj?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Competitive research and keyword identification (e.g., 380 assignments for RAMP)](https://fathom.video/share/K71gBjbTf1zEdAMyAJnDDfsQXzBzubzj?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [Content generation: \~100,000 words/month for clients at $0.10/word](https://fathom.video/share/K71gBjbTf1zEdAMyAJnDDfsQXzBzubzj?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [Onboarding process includes site indexing and context gathering](https://fathom.video/share/K71gBjbTf1zEdAMyAJnDDfsQXzBzubzj?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
  - [Work streams: enablement and execution, typically $9,000/month](https://fathom.video/share/K71gBjbTf1zEdAMyAJnDDfsQXzBzubzj?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)

### Potential Collaboration

  - [Carmel needs help with site content, storytelling, and SEO optimization for Seed](https://fathom.video/share/K71gBjbTf1zEdAMyAJnDDfsQXzBzubzj?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [GrowthX can assist with blog articles, site pages, FAQ docs, and solutions pages](https://fathom.video/share/K71gBjbTf1zEdAMyAJnDDfsQXzBzubzj?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
  - [Single work stream could cover multiple content types](https://fathom.video/share/K71gBjbTf1zEdAMyAJnDDfsQXzBzubzj?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
  - [Core product marketing messaging would require separate contractor](https://fathom.video/share/K71gBjbTf1zEdAMyAJnDDfsQXzBzubzj?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)

### Personal Updates

  - [Carmel: Taking time off before starting at Seed, traveling to Italy, Sri Lanka, and Thailand](https://fathom.video/share/K71gBjbTf1zEdAMyAJnDDfsQXzBzubzj?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Marcel: Transitioning full-time to GrowthX, leaving CMO role at G-gram](https://fathom.video/share/K71gBjbTf1zEdAMyAJnDDfsQXzBzubzj?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Carmel to reach out in December after starting at Seed](https://fathom.video/share/K71gBjbTf1zEdAMyAJnDDfsQXzBzubzj?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [Discuss specific needs and potential work stream for Seed's content and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/K71gBjbTf1zEdAMyAJnDDfsQXzBzubzj?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [Marcel to send additional information on GrowthX's services and processes](https://fathom.video/share/K71gBjbTf1zEdAMyAJnDDfsQXzBzubzj?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)
